headline: Space Race: The Top Players In A Market That Could Be Worth $1.4 Trillion By 2030
summary:
Bank of America is out with a guide to the commercial space market and the major companies involved.

The Space Market: Bank of America’s Ronald J. Epstein believes the commercial space market will hit $1.4 trillion by 2030. Epstein cites increased defense spending, growth in satellites, space tourism and resource extraction as ways the industry can grow.

headline: Judge Blocks Trump Order On TikTok Just Hours Before Ban Goes Into Effect
summary:
A federal judge has halted the Trump Administration's ban on video-sharing app TikTok.

Per multiple media reports, Judge Carl Nichols of the U.S. District Court in Washington, D.C. blocked the ban, which was set to kick in at midnight Sunday.
